Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

BagM Beih. 02, 096 [Temple dimensions][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

e₂pa-pa-ḫi ša₂ e₂SAG1

The shrine of Reš:

o 22

1 ME 50 KUŠ₃ US₂-šu₂ SAG.KI-su 2 ME ŠU KUŠ₃

its length (is) 1 hundred, 50 cubits; its width (is) 2 hundred, sixty cubits;

o 33

ŠE.NUMUN-šu₂ 1(BARIG) 2(BAN₂) 1 SILA₃

its seed-measure (is) 1 pānu, 2 sūtu (and) 1 qû.

o 44

e₂pa-pa-ḫi ša₂ e₂IRI₁₂.GAL

The shrine of Irigal:

o 55

US₂-šu₂ 2 ME ŠU KUŠ₃ SAG.KI-su 2 ME ŠU KUŠ₃

its length (is) 2 hundred, sixty cubits; its width (is) 2 hundred, sixty cubits;

o 66

ŠE.NUMUN-⸢šu₂⸣ 3(BARIG) PI 4 1/2 SILA₃2

its acreage (is) 3 pānu (and) 4 (and) a 1/2 qû.

Reverse
rr NaN  (blank)

1SAG followed by erasure

23 written over erasure
